new_value: {"description":"INVESTIGATION: This appears to work correctly. Bold is preserved in all paragraphs of multi-paragraph callouts. The Callout.to_markdown() serializes each paragraph as a separate '\u003e ' line. _parse_quote() correctly handles multi-paragraph callouts via _block_to_para_groups(). Consider closing or adding a concrete repro case."}
old_value: {"id":"extrasuite-ew9","title":"Bold lost in 2nd paragraph of multi-paragraph callout on round-trip","description":"A callout (\u003e [\\!NOTE]) that spans multiple paragraphs loses bold formatting in the 2nd and subsequent paragraphs on round-trip.
